title: Chewy Q3 2024 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Chewy delivered strong Q3 2024 results with net sales reaching $2.88 billion, representing 4.8% year-over-year growth and exceeding guidance. The company generated $138 million in adjusted EBITDA with a 4.8% margin, reflecting 180 basis points of expansion. Key metrics included 20.2 million active customers (up 160,000 sequentially) and Autoship sales of $2.3 billion (80% of total net sales, up 9% YoY). Net sales per active customer reached $567 with free cash flow of $151.8 million in Q3. Chewy opened six Chewy Vet Care clinics, targeting the high end of their four to eight clinic goal for 2024, with over half of new clinic customers subsequently shopping on chewy.com. App unique customers and monthly active users both increased in the mid-teens range year-over-year, with the company noting higher Autoship engagement, AOV, and retention rates through mobile channels. Early results from Chewy+ paid membership pilot showed members placing more orders and demonstrating higher cross-category penetration compared to non-members. For Q4 2024, the company projected net sales between $3.18-$3.20 billion (approximately 13% growth). Full-year 2024 guidance was raised to $11.79-$11.81 billion (6% growth), with adjusted EBITDA margins between 4.6-4.8%. Management emphasized that customer growth is primarily driven by internal efforts rather than industry normalization, citing improvements in adoption trends and marketing efficiency.
